title: Making Plans for Lena
original_title: Non Ma Fille, Tu N'iras Pas Danser
overview: Ever since she broke up with Nigel, Lena soldiers on through life as best she can with her two kids. She valiantly overcomes the obstacles put in her way. But she has yet to confront the worst of them: Her unstoppable family has decided, by any means necessary, to make her happy.
